title: Enhancement of ibuprofen solubility and skin permeation by conjugation with l-valine alkyl esters.

anchor_evidence.locator: permeation experiments were performed in the Franz diffusion cells
anchor_evidence.snippet: permeation experiments were performed in the Franz diffusion cells

The flux (in mg cm2 h1) of the active drug – ibuprofen and its derivatives through the skin into acceptor fluid was determined as the slope of the plot of cumulative mass in the acceptor fluid versus time.
salts of ibuprofen with L-valine alkyl esters were synthesised using the three-step method.

notes: The paper details synthesis of ibuprofen derivatives and assesses their solubility and skin permeation, comparing them to the parent ibuprofen acid.
